data.name: CUMVERSE [18+]
data.detailed_description:
Build relationships with various characters, use your Quantonium to eavesdrop and spy on girls, hack into systems and look for resources while you’re trying to find your place on Kamus after the mysterious crash. Will you get free and complete your imperial quest, or will you become a local “Great Alpha”? It’s up to you to decide - find your own answers!

Step into the shoes of an heir to a great dynasty who’s appointed ruler of the planet Kamus by the Space Emperor - the Empire has been fighting the local population for a long time. The planet is inhabited by Femians - they're wild, insatiable, constantly hungry for sex and, what’s even more important, they think you’re the chosen one sent by their gods.

Your ship is being shot down while you’re on a familiarization tour, and you end up falling into the anomaly zone - somehow it makes your semen gain supernatural qualities, which makes you a big point of attraction for the locals. You’ve crashed among the planet’s rebellious natives, and later you meet Lien, scholar of the empire, who helps you to start investigating what’s actually going on here.

You’ll meet enigmatic alien girls - rebellion leader Cassia, unaccepted by either the empire or the locals half-breed Uta, or even the bossy princess of the empire - you’ll have to find your way around them to get what you need and find answers. Play, see what this world has to show you and decide whose side you’re on!

Features:
  • 🔥 Adult content - hot and steamy scenes with a range of exotic characters!
  • 🌌 Engaging sci-fi story - navigate a planet of rebellion, power, and lust as you decide who to align with.
  • 💡 Interactive mechanics - hack into systems, gather resources, and uncover secrets with the help of your ultra-computer.
  • 🧩 Choices matter - every decision impacts your relationships and fate.
  • ✨ Beautifully crafted visuals - enjoy high-quality 3D art in every scene, from exploration and story to 18+ moments.
  • 🤖 Entertaining mini-games - resource hunting and hacking challenges will test your skills as you advance through the story.

data.short_description: You’ve crashed on a planet filled with horny and sexually addicted alien girls - now it’s up to you to decide what to do with the situation. Explore the planet and play the relaxing mini-games while you enjoy hot 18+ scenes and the intriguing story in CUMVERSE [18+]!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
